name: Liar Game
short_description: Can you find out who the Liar is? Will you outsmart everyone in this intense battle of wits?
detailed_description:
A battle of wits and deception! Every word you say can decide the outcome.

In this thrilling game with friends, no one can be trusted. Only sharp deduction and persuasive skills will lead you to victory.

At the start, regular players receive a secret keyword, but the Liar does not.

Regular players must describe the keyword without revealing too much, ensuring the Liar remains unaware.

Meanwhile, the Liar must carefully listen, deduce the keyword, and blend in. Act too obvious, and you'll be caught. Stay convincing, but don’t overplay your hand!

Are you the detective who will expose the Liar, or the master deceiver who outsmarts everyone?

Experience the ultimate psychological battle now!
